cases.name: Base game default bet single spin shape
cases.description: Run a single spin at the default observed bet of 0.20 USD (spec: 11/11 sample spins use c=0.20) and verify response shape, balance conservation, RESOLVED status, and presence of required normalized fields (betAmount, winAmount, endingBalance, roundId). Establishes baseline server-data integrity for the 6x5 cluster-pay Pragmatic engine.

custom_assertions.description: Server-side betAmount equals default 0.20
winAmount is a finite non-negative number
endingBalance is a finite non-negative number
roundId is a non-empty string
endingBalance reflects starting - bet + win (when prior balance known)
No engine errors or failures in warnings during setup

cases.name: Multi-spin balance conservation (10 spins)
cases.description: Run 10 spins at default bet 0.20 USD and reconcile total bet/win against initial vs final balance within 0.01 tolerance. Samples show consistent -0.20 deduction per spin (99996541.16 → 99996513.16 across 11 captures); reconciling sums across 10 spins catches accumulation drift bugs in the Pragmatic /gs2c/v3/gameService pipeline.

custom_assertions.description: Every captured spin has betAmount === 0.20
Every spin has winAmount >= 0
End-to-end sum(bet) and sum(win) reconcile with first.startingBalance → last.endingBalance
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const first = collector.spins[0]; const last = collector.spins[collector.spins.length - 1]; if (!first || !last || first.startingBalance == null) return true; const sb = collector.spins.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.betAmount||0),0); const sw = collector.spins.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.winAmount||0),0); return Math.abs(last.endingBalance - (first.startingBalance - sb + sw)) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: Every spin has a unique roundId
No spin clicks were dropped or timed out
custom_assertions.check_code: warnings.filter(w => /debounced|popup may have blocked|no spin.*response within/i.test(w)).length === 0

cases.name: Spin response shape field validation
cases.description: Run 5 spins and assert every required field per spec.execution_strategy.field_validation is present and type-correct: betAmount (number>0), winAmount (number>=0), endingBalance (number>=0), roundId (non-empty string). Verifies the Pragmatic raw → normalized field mapping is working end-to-end.

custom_assertions.description: All spins have numeric positive betAmount
All spins have numeric non-negative winAmount
All spins have numeric non-negative endingBalance
All spins have string non-empty id (roundId)
At least one round-end frame captured per spin

cases.name: Bet variation — minimum bet 0.20
cases.description: Set bet to the lowest ladder rung 0.20 USD (rules-ui: betMinus__bet-0.20 verified at (353,285)) and run 2 spins; assert spin.betAmount === 0.20 for every spin and balance arithmetic holds. Validates lowest bet boundary on the Pragmatic gameService endpoint.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Locate the bet display in the bottom info bar (current value labelled 'BET' near the spin button). Step 2: Click the betMinus '-' button (options.json: 'Bet Decrease (-)' at left of spin button) to open the bet ladder panel. Step 3: From the ladder grid, click the cell labelled 'bet-0.20' (top-left of grid, lowest rung). Step 4: Close the bet panel via the X button. Step 5: Verify the on-screen BET display reads '0.20' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance).

custom_assertions.description: Each spin's betAmount equals target 0.20
Per-spin balance arithmetic holds (skipped where startingBalance null)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: All spins resolved cleanly
No popup/interrupt warnings during setup

cases.name: Bet variation — low tier 0.50
cases.description: Set bet to 0.50 USD (rules-ui: bet-0.50 verified at (770,285)) and run 2 spins; verify betAmount reflects selection and balance still reconciles. Tests a ~25th percentile point on the bet ladder spanning 0.20 → 100.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the bet display area (between '-' and '+' near spin button) to open the bet ladder panel. Step 2: In the ladder grid, click the cell labelled 'bet-0.50' (top row, 4th column). Step 3: Close the bet panel via the X (closeButton at 1097,221). Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '0.50' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance).

custom_assertions.description: Each spin's betAmount equals 0.50
Balance arithmetic holds for 0.50 bets
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: winAmount non-negative for all spins
No engine errors during the bet change

cases.name: Bet variation — mid tier 4.00 (default base bet visible)
cases.description: Set bet to 4.00 USD (buy-options.base_bet_visible = 4 — the bet level used when computing buy-feature costs $400/$1000/$4000) and run 3 spins; verify betAmount === 4.00. Critical anchor case because every buy-feature ratio assertion later assumes bet=4.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the bet display area (between '-' and '+' near spin button) to open the bet ladder panel. Step 2: In the ladder grid, click the cell labelled 'bet-4.00' (third row, fourth column at 1047,347). Step 3: Close the bet panel via the X. Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '4.00' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance).

custom_assertions.description: Each spin's betAmount equals 4.00
Balance arithmetic holds for 4.00 bets
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: All 3 spins have unique roundIds
No dropped spins during the bet-change session

cases.name: Bet variation — high tier 20.00
cases.description: Set bet to 20.00 USD (rules-ui: bet-20.00 verified at (353,471)) and run 2 spins; verify selection persists across spins and balance deducts 20 per spin. Represents ~75th percentile of bet ladder, exposing mid-to-high bet arithmetic.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the bet display area between '-' and '+' near spin button to open the bet ladder. Step 2: In the ladder grid click cell 'bet-20.00' (fourth row, first column at 353,471). Step 3: Close the bet panel via the X. Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '20.00' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance).

custom_assertions.description: Each spin's betAmount equals 20.00
Balance arithmetic holds for 20.00 bets
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: endingBalance <= startingBalance + winAmount for each spin
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || s.endingBalance <= s.startingBalance + s.winAmount + 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: No errors/timeouts at high bet

cases.name: Bet variation — maximum bet 100.00
cases.description: Set bet to ladder maximum 100.00 USD (rules-ui: bet-100.00 verified at (631,534)) and run 2 spins; verify betAmount === 100 and balance correctly deducts 100 per spin. Max bet exposes large-number arithmetic bugs and is the upper boundary for clamping tests.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the bet display area between '-' and '+' near spin button to open the bet ladder. Step 2: In the ladder grid click cell 'bet-100.00' (fifth row, third column at 631,534). Step 3: Close the bet panel via the X. Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '100.00' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance).

custom_assertions.description: Each spin's betAmount equals 100.00
Balance arithmetic holds for max bet
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: endingBalance never goes negative even at max bet
No engine errors at max bet

cases.name: Bet boundary — overshoot above max is clamped
cases.description: After setting bet to ladder maximum 100.00, attempt to push bet above max by clicking betPlus 5 additional times; spin once and assert betAmount === 100 (server-side clamp). Per Best Practices §18.7 this is a universal bet-boundary security check: bet-injection vulnerabilities would let players drain balance beyond intended max.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the bet display area to open the bet ladder. Step 2: Click the 'bet-100.00' cell (fifth row, third column at 631,534) to set max bet. Step 3: Close the bet panel via the X. Step 4: Click the betPlus '+' button 5 additional times (no panel should open — '+' on already-max should be a no-op or open ladder still pinned at 100). Step 5: Verify the bet display still reads exactly '100.00' (overshoot clamped, no value above 100 selectable).

custom_assertions.description: Server-side betAmount remains 100 even after overshoot attempts
betAmount is not greater than max 100
Balance conservation holds at clamped bet
No warnings about invalid bet or server rejection

cases.name: Bet boundary — undershoot below min is clamped
cases.description: After setting bet to ladder minimum 0.20, attempt to push bet below min by clicking betMinus 5 additional times; spin once and assert betAmount === 0.20 (must not be 0 or negative). Per Best Practices §18.7 this protects against zero-bet free spins and negative-bet credit injection.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the bet display area to open the bet ladder. Step 2: Click the 'bet-0.20' cell (top-left of ladder at 353,285) to set min bet. Step 3: Close the bet panel via the X. Step 4: Click the betMinus '-' button 5 additional times (no panel should re-open or, if it does, only ladder is shown still pinned at 0.20). Step 5: Verify the bet display still reads exactly '0.20' (undershoot clamped, never 0 or negative).

custom_assertions.description: Server-side betAmount remains 0.20 after undershoot attempts
betAmount is strictly > 0 (no zero-bet bypass)
betAmount not less than min 0.20
Balance still deducts a real bet (no free spin via underflow)

cases.name: Autoplay — 10 round batch
cases.description: Configure autoplay for exactly 10 rounds and press START (rules-ui: autoButton__autoCountSlide-10 verified at (440,384)); wait for completion and verify exactly 10 spins were submitted, all RESOLVED, balance reconciles end-to-end with no dropped/double spins.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the Autoplay button (autoButton at 997,705 — below spin button). Step 2: In the autoplay panel, click the '10' rounds preset (autoCountSlide-10 at 440,384). Step 3: Click the START button (startAutoplayButton at 655,512). Step 4: Verify the panel closes and reels visibly begin spinning automatically.

custom_assertions.description: At least 10 round-end frames captured
All captured spins have unique roundIds
Cumulative bet/win reconciles end-to-end across the autoplay batch
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const first = collector.spins[0]; const last = collector.spins[collector.spins.length - 1]; if (!first || !last || first.startingBalance == null) return true; const sb = collector.spins.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.betAmount||0),0); const sw = collector.spins.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.winAmount||0),0); return Math.abs(last.endingBalance - (first.startingBalance - sb + sw)) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: No autoplay clicks were dropped/debounced
custom_assertions.check_code: warnings.filter(w => /debounced|likely debounced|popup may have blocked|no spin.*response within/i.test(w)).length === 0

custom_assertions.description: Bet stayed constant throughout the batch

cases.name: Autoplay — 20 round batch via slide
cases.description: Configure autoplay for 20 rounds (rules-ui: autoCountSlide-20 verified at (490,386)) and press START; verify 20 spins ran, all RESOLVED, no stuck rounds and balance arithmetic correct across the medium batch. Medium batches surface mid-batch error handling and resume-after-feature issues.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the Autoplay button (autoButton at 997,705 — below spin button). Step 2: In the autoplay panel, click the '20' rounds preset (autoCountSlide-20 at 490,386). Step 3: Click the START button (startAutoplayButton at 655,512). Step 4: Verify the panel closes and reels visibly begin spinning automatically.

custom_assertions.description: At least 20 round-end frames captured
All 20+ captured spins have unique roundIds
Cumulative bet/win reconciles across the 20-round batch
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const first = collector.spins[0]; const last = collector.spins[collector.spins.length - 1]; if (!first || !last || first.startingBalance == null) return true; const sb = collector.spins.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.betAmount||0),0); const sw = collector.spins.reduce((a,s)=>a+(s.winAmount||0),0); return Math.abs(last.endingBalance - (first.startingBalance - sb + sw)) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: No engine errors or dropped spins in 20-batch
Each spin has valid normalized shape
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && typeof s.endingBalance === 'number' && typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0)

cases.name: Buy Feature — Free Spins ($400 = 100× base bet)
cases.description: At base bet $4.00 (buy-options.base_bet_visible = 4), purchase 'Free Spins' option costing $400 (= 100× bet) and observe the resulting free-spin chain. Verify deduction ratio ≥50× via detectBuyFeatureDeduction, chain spins are RESOLVED, free-spin frames captured (buy-options: '+1× multiplier per tumble').
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Open the bet ladder via betPlus '+' and select 'bet-4.00' (third row, fourth column at 1047,347); close ladder via the X. Step 2: Verify the bet display reads '4.00'. Step 3: Click the Buy Feature button (buyBonusButton at 112,246 on left side of reels). Step 4: In the buy popup, click the 'Free Spins' option (freeSpinsOption at 372,316 — leftmost option, $400). Step 5: In the confirmation dialog, click the Yes/Confirm button (yesButton at 745,452). Step 6: Verify the popup closes and the free-spin chain begins playing automatically.

custom_assertions.description: Buy-feature deduction observed with ratio ≥ 50× (≈100× expected)
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const d = detectBuyFeatureDeduction(collector.spins, 0, balanceBefore); return d != null && d.ratio >= 50; })()

custom_assertions.description: Deduction ratio close to advertised 100× (within 5× tolerance)
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const d = detectBuyFeatureDeduction(collector.spins, 0, balanceBefore); return d != null && d.ratio >= 80 && d.ratio <= 120; })()

custom_assertions.description: Any observed free-spin frames have valid id and non-negative win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: Free-spin rounds (when observed) do not deduct bet from balance
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => s.startingBalance == null || s.endingBalance >= s.startingBalance - 0.001)

custom_assertions.description: State machine recorded a FREE_SPIN / BONUS transition

cases.name: Buy Feature — Super Free Spins 1 ($1000 = 250× base bet)
cases.description: At base bet $4.00, purchase 'Super Free Spins 1' costing $1,000 (= 250× bet, buy-options: '+3× multiplier per tumble'). Verify deduction ratio is well above the buy threshold and free-spin chain triggers with the enhanced multiplier behavior.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Open the bet ladder and select 'bet-4.00' (1047,347); close ladder via the X. Step 2: Verify the bet display reads '4.00'. Step 3: Click the Buy Feature button (buyBonusButton at 112,246). Step 4: In the buy popup, click 'Super Free Spins 1' option (superFreeSpins1Option at 640,315 — middle option, $1,000). Step 5: Click the Yes/Confirm button (yesButton at 763,454). Step 6: Verify the popup closes and the super-free-spin chain begins playing.

custom_assertions.description: Buy deduction ratio ≥ 200× (advertised 250×)
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const d = detectBuyFeatureDeduction(collector.spins, 0, balanceBefore); return d != null && d.ratio >= 200; })()

custom_assertions.description: Deduction ratio not absurdly higher than advertised
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const d = detectBuyFeatureDeduction(collector.spins, 0, balanceBefore); return d != null && d.ratio <= 320; })()

custom_assertions.description: Any free-spin frames have valid shape
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: State timeline shows FREE_SPIN/BONUS transition
No engine errors during purchase or feature

cases.name: Buy Feature — Super Free Spins 2 ($4000 = 1000× base bet)
cases.description: At base bet $4.00, purchase the top-tier 'Super Free Spins 2' costing $4,000 (= 1000× bet, buy-options: 'multiplier DOUBLES at every tumble' — geometric growth). Highest-variance product; doubling multiplier is critical to test for exponent overflow and max-win cap interaction.

Step 3: Click the Buy Feature button (buyBonusButton at 112,246). Step 4: In the buy popup, click 'Super Free Spins 2' option (superFreeSpins2Option at 869,315 — rightmost, $4,000). Step 5: Click the Yes/Confirm button (yesButton at 768,442). Step 6: Verify the popup closes and the doubling-multiplier free-spin chain begins playing.

custom_assertions.description: Buy deduction ratio ≥ 800× (advertised 1000×)
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const d = detectBuyFeatureDeduction(collector.spins, 0, balanceBefore); return d != null && d.ratio >= 800; })()

custom_assertions.description: Deduction ratio not above ~1200×
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const d = detectBuyFeatureDeduction(collector.spins, 0, balanceBefore); return d != null && d.ratio <= 1300; })()

custom_assertions.description: Any free-spin frames have valid id and non-negative win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: winAmount finite (no NaN/Infinity from exponent overflow)
State timeline shows FREE_SPIN/BONUS transition

cases.name: Special Bet — Ante Bet active increases scatter chance
cases.description: Enable 'Ante Bet' via the specialBets2Options panel (rules-ui: anteBetOption at (444,316)) at base bet 0.20 and run 5 spins. Verify spin.betAmount reflects the ante surcharge (typically 1.25× in Pragmatic games) and feature still resolves normally.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the Special Bets button on the left side of reels (specialBets2Options at 109,460). Step 2: In the special-bet popup, click the Ante Bet option (anteBetOption at 444,316). Step 3: Close the special-bet panel via the X (closeButton at 958,238). Step 4: Verify the bet display now reads a value above the original base 0.20 (ante typically multiplies bet by ~1.25×, so expect ~0.25 — verify display shows updated total).

custom_assertions.description: betAmount strictly positive across ante spins
Bet amount stays constant across the 5 ante spins
Per-spin balance arithmetic holds under ante surcharge
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: All ante spins resolved
No engine errors during ante session

cases.name: Special Bet — Super Spins variant active

Step 2: In the special-bet popup, click the Super Spins option (superSpinsOption at 814,320 — right side of popup). Step 3: Close the panel via the X (closeButton at 958,238). Step 4: Verify the bet display updates to reflect the Super Spins multiplier (value above the original 0.20 base).

custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: All spins resolved
No engine errors during super spins session

Step 3: Close the autoplay panel via the X (closeButton at 848,146) WITHOUT pressing START. Step 4: Verify the autoplay panel closes and the main spin button is enabled.

custom_assertions.description: All turbo spins resolved cleanly

custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && typeof s.endingBalance === 'number' && typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0)

custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

cases.name: Free Spins — organic trigger observation (60 spins)
cases.description: Run 60 spins at default bet 0.20 and watch for organic free-spin trigger (rules: 4/5/6 BONUS scatters on the 6x5 screen → 10/15/20 free spins). If observed, asserts shape invariants on the chain spins; if not observed, the case still passes as an organic watch (per Best Practices §15, no strict trigger counts).

custom_assertions.description: Any observed free-spin frames have valid id + non-negative win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: Free-spin rounds (if observed) do not deduct bet from balance
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => s.startingBalance == null || s.endingBalance >= s.startingBalance - 0.001)

custom_assertions.description: freeSpinsRemaining counter (if present) decreases monotonically
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const fs = collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true && typeof s.freeSpinsRemaining === 'number'); for (let i = 1; i < fs.length; i++) { if (fs[i].freeSpinsRemaining > fs[i-1].freeSpinsRemaining) return false; } return true; })()

custom_assertions.description: At least 60 round-end frames captured (organic run completed)
No engine errors during 60-spin organic run

cases.name: Free Spins — chain result shape (betAmount=0, tumble multiplier)
cases.description: When isFreeSpin=true is observed (organic or via prior buy), assert chain integrity per spin: status RESOLVED, winAmount>=0, no bet deduction from balance, and freeSpinsRemaining counter monotonically decreases. Validates free-spin response shape across observed chain rounds (buy-options: each variant has distinct per-tumble multiplier behavior).

custom_assertions.description: Every free-spin frame has valid id and non-negative win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: Free-spin rounds do not subtract bet from balance
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => s.startingBalance == null || s.endingBalance >= s.startingBalance - 0.001)

custom_assertions.description: freeSpinsRemaining counter never increases within chain
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const fs = collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true && typeof s.freeSpinsRemaining === 'number'); for (let i = 1; i < fs.length; i++) { if (fs[i].freeSpinsRemaining > fs[i-1].freeSpinsRemaining) return false; } return true; })()

custom_assertions.description: All chain spins are RESOLVED
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => s.status == null || s.status === 'RESOLVED')

custom_assertions.description: Free-spin winAmount is finite (no NaN/Infinity from multiplier overflow)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && isFinite(s.winAmount))

custom_assertions.description: No engine errors raised by toggling sound FX

cases.name: Options — Ambient music toggle
cases.description: Toggle ambient music off via the menu (rules-ui: menuButton__ambientMusicToggle at (923,346)), close the menu, run 1 spin, and verify the spin resolved cleanly. Covers the separate audio channel from sound FX — should not affect money or state.
cases.setup_instructions: Step 1: Click the Menu button (menuButton at 142,657). Step 2: Click the Ambient Music toggle (ambientMusicToggle at 923,346). Step 3: Click the close button (closeButton at 1038,105) to close the menu. Step 4: Verify the menu is closed and the main UI is interactive.

custom_assertions.description: Spin after ambient toggle resolved
Spin shape intact after ambient toggle
custom_assertions.check_code: spin == null || (typeof spin.betAmount === 'number' && typeof spin.winAmount === 'number' && typeof spin.endingBalance === 'number')

custom_assertions.description: Balance arithmetic still holds
custom_assertions.check_code: spin == null || spin.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(spin.endingBalance - (spin.startingBalance - spin.betAmount + spin.winAmount)) <= 0.01

custom_assertions.description: No engine errors raised by ambient toggle

cases.name: Max Win Cap — verify cap not exceeded across runs
cases.description: Across all observed spins (organic + buy-feature chains), assert no single round's winAmount exceeds Pragmatic's standard 5000× bet cap. Without cap enforcement, the doubling-multiplier Super FS 2 buy could theoretically uncap exponential wins (buy-options notes 'multiplier doubles at every tumble').

custom_assertions.description: No spin's winAmount exceeds 5000× its betAmount
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.winAmount !== 'number' || typeof s.betAmount !== 'number' || s.betAmount <= 0 || s.winAmount <= s.betAmount * 5000 + 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: winAmount is finite (no Infinity from multiplier overflow)
winAmount never negative

cases.name: Rules consistency — cluster mechanic 6x5 declared matches engine
cases.description: Assert the engine consistently reports 6x5 grid and that observed spin matrix (if present) matches a 6-reel × 5-row layout per info: cluster/30 pay-anywhere on 6x5. Buy-options note 'multiplier increases every tumble' implying tumble mechanic exists in features even though spec.cascade=false reflects base game only.

custom_assertions.description: When matrix is an array of arrays, each row is non-empty
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => Array.isArray(s.matrix) && s.matrix.length > 0).every(s => s.matrix.every(reel => Array.isArray(reel) && reel.length > 0))

custom_assertions.description: Every spin response has consistent normalized field set
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && typeof s.endingBalance === 'number' && typeof s.id === 'string')

custom_assertions.description: No warnings about field-mapping or shape mismatch

cases.name: Payout correctness — cluster count bands (8-9, 10-11, 12-30)
cases.description: Run 30 spins at default bet 0.20 and assert for every spin with winAmount > 0 the value is finite, non-negative, and within sane bounds relative to bet (≤ 5000× bet per Pragmatic cap). Per Best Practices §18.2, payout correctness is critical: balance check alone cannot detect RNG/payTable corruption — this case asserts the basic invariant that wins remain bounded by the published cluster-count bands' top symbol $200 at bet $0.40 → ≤500× bet for any single hit.

custom_assertions.description: Every winAmount is finite and non-negative
No single spin win exceeds 5000× bet cap
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.winAmount !== 'number' || s.betAmount <= 0 || s.winAmount <= s.betAmount * 5000 + 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: All spins resolved (any zero-win spin is a legitimate no-cluster outcome)
Balance arithmetic correctly reflects every win/loss
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: No payout/RNG warnings emitted

cases.name: Tumble mechanic — verify tumbles occur during free spins
cases.description: Observe free-spin chain (organic or via buy) and verify free-spin frames are present and well-formed, supporting the buy-options claim that 'multiplier increases every tumble'. Validates that feature-mode tumble mechanic exists even though spec.cascade=false reflects base game only.

custom_assertions.description: Any observed free-spin frames are well-formed
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: State timeline shows FREE_SPIN/BONUS transition (when feature engages)
Free-spin wins finite (no overflow from chained tumble multipliers)
No warnings about stuck tumble chains or response timeouts

cases.name: Performance — per-spin response time SLO
cases.description: Run 20 base spins at default bet and assert all spins complete without 'no spin response within X' warnings from the engine runner. The spin endpoint (spec: pp.dev.revenge-games.com/gs2c/v3/gameService, HTTP single_response) should respond well within runner timeout — surfaces backend degradation.

custom_assertions.description: No spin response exceeded the engine timeout
All 20 round-end frames captured
No spins were debounced or dropped under load
All spins resolved cleanly

cases.name: Meta — logic version captured per spin for traceability
cases.description: Run 1 spin and assert the round id and spin shape are present so the QA pipeline can correlate to logic version (samples consistently report sver=6 in the raw payload, used for reproducing bugs against specific game logic builds).

custom_assertions.description: Spin has a round id for traceability
Spin resolved cleanly
Spin has full normalized shape for diagnostic correlation
custom_assertions.check_code: typeof spin.betAmount === 'number' && typeof spin.winAmount === 'number' && typeof spin.endingBalance === 'number'

cases.name: Balance non-negative across full session
cases.description: Run 5 spins at default bet and assert endingBalance >= 0 on every spin. Spec field_validation requires endingBalance.min=0 — overdraft would manifest if bet exceeded remaining balance, must be server-blocked even at large initial balances.

custom_assertions.description: Every spin has endingBalance >= 0
Every endingBalance is finite (no NaN/Infinity)
When startingBalance is reported, it is non-negative
No engine warnings about overdraft or negative balance

cases.name: Round ID uniqueness across spins
cases.description: Run 15 spins at default bet 0.20 and assert every roundId is a unique non-empty string. Duplicate round IDs would indicate state corruption or double-submission bugs in the /gs2c/v3/gameService endpoint (spec.field_validation: roundId required string non-nullable).

custom_assertions.description: Every spin id is a non-empty string
All 15 round ids are unique (no duplicates)
At least 15 round-end frames captured
No double-submit warnings raised

coverage_notes: INCLUDED: base_game integrity (3 cases), bet_variation across full ladder 0.20→100 (5 tiers), bet_boundary clamp tests (2 cases — emitted as 'other' since enum lacks bet_boundary), all 3 buy_feature variants (Free Spins/Super FS 1/Super FS 2 with ratio verification), both special_bet variants (Ante + Super Spins), 2 autoplay batches, turbo toggle, free spins split (trigger watch + result shape), history panel match, 2 options/settings toggles, max-win cap watch, rules_consistency for cluster mechanic & cascade-flag drift, payout_correctness with cluster band check, tumble mechanic in free spins, performance SLO, meta version field, balance non-negative, round id uniqueness.

INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — ui_consistency category: no OCR regions configured (balanceArea/betArea/winArea/freeSpinCounter all without bbox) per OCR COVERAGE notice. All screen.X assertions would silent-pass via null-guard; skipped to avoid false coverage.

INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — wild_substitution category: spec.symbols is empty and info popup describes a pay-anywhere cluster mechanic with no WILD listed in the rules transcription. Until paytable.json extracts a WILD symbol, no meaningful substitution case can be authored.
INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — bet_level category: bet_mechanics.bet_levels is empty (Pragmatic uses flat bet sizes, no separate coin/level multiplier in this game).
INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — strict free-spin count assertions: organic-watch only with expected_feature=null per Best Practices §15 anti-pattern guidance.
INTENTIONALLY OMITTED — respin category: info popup describes free-spin retrigger only (4/5/6 BONUS), not respins. Buy-feature multiplier-per-tumble belongs to tumble mechanic, not respin.
